text: Hey, I was just wondering if you could help me figure out something weird with my order? I think something's off, but I'm not sure what exactly.

I noticed that my account is linked to the wrong email address, and I thought I had updated it last week, but it seems like nothing changed. Can you clarify why the change didn’t go through? I'm quite confused because I received a confirmation email about the update, yet my settings still reflect the old email. What could be the issue here?
my app crashes when i try to upload images. i don’t know what to do. help?

I've been trying to access my account for a few days now, and it keeps saying my password is incorrect, even though I know it’s right. I even tried resetting it, but I didn't receive any email to confirm the reset. It's really frustrating because I need to check some important updates, and I can’t seem to get in. Can someone help me? I can't figure out what’s going wrong.

Could you please confirm whether there is a student discount available, and if so, could you provide details on the application process? I'm also curious about any upcoming promotions, as I might need to buy additional supplies soon.

I am quite frustrated because I received my product but was told there would be a warranty included, yet I don’t see any documentation. Can you clarify this? It's a bit contradictory as I was assured that everything would be included.
I would like to request a refund for my recent order, however, the confirmaton email was not sent, thus I am uncertain of the process.
I just need to know if the features I want are included in the package I have. It’s really important to me, but I’m not sure where to look.
I read somewhere that you might have a maintenance window soon, can you confirm that for me? But I thought there were no scheduled interruptions this month?

Hey there! So, I was trying to connect my device to the Wi-Fi, and I swear I've followed every step from the manual. But then, out of nowhere, it just keeps saying, 'unable to connect.' I even double-checked if the network's down, and everything else works perfectly. It's such a bummer because I wanted to use it for my project tonight. Can you dig into this? It feels like I'm missing something obvious, but I just can’t figure it out!
Hey, I need to get my money back for this mixer. It stopped working after just a week. Can you help?

Hey, so I was trying to update my software, right? And it keeps showing this weird error message that, like, I can't even understand. It's saying something about a 'fatal error' or whatever, and I have no clue what to do next. I've restarted it a few times, but it's still not working. Any help would be appreciated, because I'm kinda stuck here.

Hey there, I was wondering about this thing, so like if I wanted to know if my account can still work even after I kinda forgot to pay for a month, would it still be possible to access it? I mean, like, will it just be gone or can I maybe get back in somehow? Just curious, thanks!
I thought I was getting a full refund for that last order, but now I see it says non-refundable! Can you please help clear this up? I really didn’t expect this confusion.
So, I thought I had the basic plan, but I'm seeing pro features? Can I still downgrade?
I received my order, but I thought I ordered two items. Can I get a refund for the extra one? I’m confused.
